etymology.description: äşĽ (gather) + ĺ†Š (book) = gather books or read words as they're written -> order
etymology.interpretation: The character äľ–(lĂşn) uses the components äşĽ (gather) and ĺ†Š (book) to convey the idea of ordering or arranging written words or books. The process of gathering books implies creating order, reflecting the character's meaning.
